title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: Tel Aviv, Israel (Global / Tel Aviv HQ)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling revenue beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer comfortable building flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating with globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise matches perfectly, Head of RevOps role is primary target, and Tel Aviv location is ideal. Only minor gap is no explicit mention of $30M+ ARR scaling experience, but seniority level suggests capability.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and thought it could be a strong fit given your background scaling GTM operations in high-growth B2B SaaS. Your fintech expertise and hands-on RevOps leadership—particularly around Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional team alignment—directly mirrors what their CRO is building. Given Finout's trajectory from $85M+ funding to scaling revenue operations across Tel Aviv and New York, I'd love to explore whether this resonates with your next move.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. Responsibilities include partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance to optimize territory compositions, analyzing historical performance and account data for segmentation, and maintaining territory mapping in CRM systems like Fullcast and Salesforce. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and territories, strong analytical skills with Excel/SQL/BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and pipeline optimization are core RevOps competencies, though this role is slightly more specialized in territory modeling than a broader Head of RevOps position.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable GTM operations in B2B SaaS, and Gong's challenge of optimizing territory models for global scale is exactly the kind of RevOps work I thrive on. Your need to redesign territory compositions while maintaining Salesforce integrity aligns perfectly with how I've approached pipeline forecasting and sales operations in high-growth environments.

title: Revenue Operations (RevOps) Manager
description: Passage Health is hiring its first dedicated RevOps leader to serve as a core member of GTM leadership and architect of data, insights, and operational excellence across Sales and Marketing. You'll work hand-in-hand with the CEO and GTM leadership to define metrics, shape strategic decisions, and build the analytical and operational backbone driving growth. Requires 3+ years in RevOps/BizOps in early-stage startups or consulting, ideally in SaaS or health tech, with a strong analytical and systems mindset and experience building GTM systems.
score_reason: Excellent match for first dedicated RevOps leader role with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience and proven GTM systems building. Strong analytical mindset and CEO/leadership collaboration experience align perfectly with the strategic mandate, though early-stage startup scaling (vs. mature company operations) is the primary consideration.
ai_opener: Omri - I came across Passage Health's RevOps opening and thought it could be a natural fit. Building GTM infrastructure from the ground up for a health tech company that's scaling is exactly the kind of high-leverage work I've done multiple times - architecting the systems, metrics, and analytical backbone that let Sales and Marketing operate at their best. Would be curious to learn more about where you're at in your growth curve.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Platomics, a health-tech company, seeks a part-time (20h/week) RevOps Manager with potential to move full-time in early 2027. Responsibilities include administering CRM (HubSpot) and RevOps tools, ensuring integrations and data hygiene, partnering with sales/marketing/finance on goals and revenue strategies, and supporting forecasting, territory planning, and quota setting. Requires 3+ years in revenue operations, sales operations, or business analytics, preferably in tech (SaaS, cloud, AI). Salary €25,000-€31,000 annually. Remote across Europe.
score_reason: Strong technical fit with 15+ years RevOps/GTM experience, HubSpot expertise, and health-tech/B2B SaaS background. Concerns: part-time start with conditional full-time conversion, significant salary discount vs. market for seniority level, and Vienna location outside preferred zones (though remote option mitigates).
ai_opener: Omri, I came across your RevOps background and thought of Platomics—they're building sophisticated health-tech revenue infrastructure and explicitly looking for someone who can scale both CRM governance and GTM strategy. Your 15+ years in B2B SaaS and hands-on HubSpot mastery would be a natural fit, though I want to be transparent: they're starting at 20h/week with a 2027 full-time conversion path and a €25-31k range that may be below your current market value. Worth a conversation to explore if the flexibility and equity/growth potential align with where you want to focus next?

title: RevOps Manager

This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, Marketing Ops, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, complex workflows, APIs), and hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred). Target salary $120,000-$170,000 USD plus equity.
score_reason: Strong technical RevOps match with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience, HubSpot expertise, and proven ability to architect CRM infrastructure and implement AI-driven sales processes. Slight consideration: nonprofit fundraising vertical is adjacent but not core SaaS experience, though AI-native GTM aligns perfectly.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Instrumentl is building an AI-native revenue engine for nonprofits—a space that needs sophisticated RevOps infrastructure. With your background architecting CRM data models and leading technical implementations across enterprise SaaS, you'd immediately own the systems that power their go-to-market. I think there's a real opportunity to discuss how your experience scaling revenue operations could accelerate Instrumentl's growth trajectory.

With 15+ years in revenue operations and hands-on Salesforce administration paired with aggressive AI integration, I'm positioned to own your full GTM software stack and drive the renewal process automation and cross-functional alignment your growth stage demands.
